subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant of God unto him who hath been guided by the effulgent rays of the Sun of Oneness, and who hath forsaken his homeland, then sought refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من عبد الله الی الذی اهتدی بانوار شمس احدیا و هاجر عن وطنه ثم استجار
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
